name: Banking Circle Financial Infrastructure API
what_it_does: Banking Circle financial infrastructure REST API for payment service providers (PSPs), fintechs, and financial institutions to access bank-grade IBAN accounts, SEPA/SWIFT payments, FX, and liquidity management without the capital requirements of a full banking license, enabling embedded banking and payment infrastructure for the payments industry through Banking Circle's European banking license. Enables AI agents to manage virtual IBAN account creation for embedded banking automation, handle SEPA Credit Transfer for European payment automation, access SWIFT payment initiation for global wire transfer automation, retrieve account balance and statement for banking ledger automation, manage FX conversion for multi-currency payment automation, handle direct debit mandate for European recurring payment automation, access card acquiring settlement for PSP banking automation, retrieve real-time payment notification for banking event automation, manage payment file processing for bulk payment automation, and integrate Banking Circle with PSP, fintech, marketplace, and enterprise platforms for end-to-end European embedded banking infrastructure automation.
use_cases: Creating virtual IBANs for PSP merchant settlement agents
Processing SEPA transfers for European fintech banking infrastructure agents
Managing FX conversion for multi-currency payment platform agents
Providing banking accounts for payment service provider settlement agents
not_for: Consumer retail banking products (Banking Circle is B2B infrastructure for PSPs/fintechs)
Simple payment gateway integration (Banking Circle is financial infrastructure, not a merchant gateway)
Non-European operations (Banking Circle has strongest coverage in EU/UK)
best_when: A PSP, fintech, or financial institution wanting AI agents to automate bank-grade IBAN accounts, SEPA/SWIFT payments, and FX through Banking Circle's European banking infrastructure without needing a full banking license.
avoid_when: DESIGNED FOR PSPs AND FINTECHS — NOT MERCHANTS: Banking Circle API is intended for PSPs and financial institutions as infrastructure clients; automated direct merchant integration without PSP intermediary creates wrong client relationship; automated merchant using Banking Circle as payment gateway creates compliance mismatch. IBAN CREATION REQUIRES KYB: Banking Circle IBAN account creation requires end-client KYB/KYC verification; automated account creation pipeline must complete compliance screening; automated immediate IBAN creation without KYB creates compliance_required rejection. SEPA TIMING IS T+0 OR T+1: Banking Circle SEPA Instant (SCT Inst) is real-time but standard SEPA is T+1; automated payment timing must distinguish instant vs standard; automated real-time assumption for standard SEPA creates 24-hour delivery expectation mismatch. FX RATE LOCKS ON CONVERSION: Banking Circle FX rate is locked at conversion request; automated FX must convert within rate validity window; automated delayed execution creates rate_expired and new FX rate may be less favorable.

auth.notes: Banking Circle uses OAuth 2.0 with mTLS for API authentication. REST API with JSON. Luxembourg HQ / Copenhagen, Denmark. Founded 2013 by Anders la Cour and Laust Bertelsen. Owned by Saxo Bank. Products: Virtual IBAN, SEPA CT/DD, SWIFT, FX, card acquiring settlement. No public SDK. EU banking license (Luxembourg). GDPR. MAS Singapore. Serves 300+ PSPs and fintechs. Competes with Modulr and ClearBank for embedded banking infrastructure.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — institutional onboarding required
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-transaction and account fees negotiated; IBAN account monthly fee + SEPA per-transaction fee + FX spread
pricing.notes: Luxembourg/Copenhagen. Saxo Bank owned. Institutional pricing negotiated. EU banking licensed.

performance.rate_limits: High throughput per client; payment and account APIs have rate limits; webhooks for payment and account events

known_agent_gotchas: MTLS CERTIFICATE REQUIRED IN ADDITION TO OAUTH: Banking Circle uses mutual TLS (client certificate) combined with OAuth; automated API client must present client certificate for mTLS handshake; automated OAuth-only client without mTLS certificate creates TLS handshake failure before auth

KYB ONBOARDING GATES ALL ACCOUNT OPERATIONS: Banking Circle client onboarding requires full KYB (legal entity, beneficial owner, purpose of business); automated account operations require completed KYB; automated API calls before KYB approval creates client_not_approved rejection

SEPA INSTANT AVAILABILITY NOT UNIVERSAL: Banking Circle SEPA Instant (SCT Inst) requires recipient bank to support SCT Inst scheme; automated instant payment must check recipient bank SCT Inst support; automated instant assumption creates fallback to next-day if recipient not SCT Inst enabled

IBAN ACCOUNT BALANCE IS REAL-TIME: Banking Circle account balance is real-time; automated cash management must account for in-flight transactions; automated balance check before large payment may not reflect concurrent in-flight debits

PAYMENT REFERENCE IS CRITICAL FOR RECONCILIATION: Banking Circle SEPA payments use remittance information for reconciliation; automated payment must include unique reference; automated missing or duplicate reference creates reconciliation failure for settlement reporting
agent_readiness.security_notes: EU banking infrastructure. EU banking license, AML5, PSD2, GDPR. OAuth2 + mTLS. EU. Financial transaction and IBAN data.

security_score_components.security_notes: EU banking infrastructure. EU banking license, AML5, PSD2. OAuth2 + mTLS. EU. Bank account and financial data.
